title: Though The Bloom Lay Lost in Clouds

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text:
——I suppose this'll be the last one for the day? 
I'll leave the stopwatch in your capable hands.

She set off on today's final run. I wanted her to unleash all 
the power she had. And to help her do that, I tensed up my 
full body and——
choice_data_list: GOOD "LUCK", "LUCK"Y LI"LUCK"!!
GOOD "LUCK", "LUCK"Y LI"LUCK"!!

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text:
………… 
——Of course. If you'll excuse me.

Lucky Lilac had a hidden explosivity lying deep within her. 
And we found discovered I could draw that power out…
by playing the fool.
Whenever she snapped back against a gag, it awakened that power. Her habit of holding herself back meant that when she did let loose, the force she unleashed was all the more powerful.
choice_data_list: (But… That last joke might've been a dud.)

text_block_list.text:
As I took note of her racing times, I wrote something else along 
with them. "Don't just make jokes… Be a better fool!"
choice_data_list: (Not sure how exactly I'll do that, though.)

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text:
Trainer—— Hmm? 
Why, you're lookin' mighty stressed.
choice_data_list: Oh, sorry! Just thinking about stuff…

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text:
Hmm… How about we go on a walk to clear your head? 
I was just about to a break myself, as it happens.

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text:
Too much stress is bad for your health. 
I'm no psychologist, but I'm more than happy to lend ya an ear.
choice_data_list: (! Oh yeah. I can just see how Luck feels about them.)

text_block_list.text:
Luckily for me, I had a whole bunch of material written in my 
notebook. I decided to try out those jokes, with her as my test 
audience.

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text:
I pay this flower garden a visit every now and then. 
It's a sight to behold once the flowers are all in full bloom.
choice_data_list: <size=36>Makes me wanna put the petal to the metal.</size>
<size=36>Makes me wanna put the petal to the metal.</size>

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text:
——What? 
…Well, I'm glad ya liked it. Anyway… 
Anyplace in particular ya want to go, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text:
The dance studio? 
…Ya feel like beltin' out a song to relax? 
Just kiddi——
choice_data_list: No… I just… I REALLY WANNA DANCE!
No… I just… I REALLY WANNA DANCE!

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text: What?
choice_data_list: "Take everything I've got♡"

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text:
……………… 
——Well, would ya look at that.
You're a real talented dancer, Trainer.
choice_data_list: "Thanksies! Kyun ♡"

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text: ……………. ——Ahem. I think that's more than enough relaxation, don't ya?

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text:
The secret "Joke Master" hiding in the Academy…? 
…I'm sorry, what on earth have ya been——
choice_data_list: Wanna be their disciple with me, Luck?
Wanna be their disciple with me, Luck?

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text:
………………… 
——Oh, no, I'm quite all right.
choice_data_list: Apparently their jokes can shoot lightning.
Apparently their jokes can shoot lightning.

text_block_list.text:
As we went from place to place, I tested my jokes… I coudln't 
really tell which ones worked, but at least I could write down 
Luck's reactions. I went to sneak them into my notebook, but—

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text:
Excuse me, Trainer—— 
…Wait, what is that you're writing?
choice_data_list: Oh!! It's, uh, nothing… ACK!

text_block_list.text:
I leaped in surprise, dropping my notes… 
They landed right at her feet with a thunk, 
falling wide open for her to see.

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text:
"Menishuki 〇: High-energy jokes seem like they'd work" 
"Rapid-fire small jokes effective?" 
…What is this?

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text:
…Have ya been taking these notes about your jokes this 
whole time?

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text:
Are ya actually lookin' to be a dang comedian??!! 
Trainers ain't supposed to be doin' this kinda stuff!
choice_data_list: (There's that reaction I was looking for!)

text_block_list.text:
……No, I didn't have time to celebrate. 
If I didn't say something quick, she'd think I wasn't taking 
my job seriously!
choice_data_list: I just… I wanted to be a better fool for you.
I just… I wanted to be a better fool for you.

text_block_list.text:
I thought back to when she was still seeking Orfevre's approval. 
Ever since I first pulled the trigger with my antics, 
and saw her break away like a speeding bullet, I knew…

…That Lucky Lilac's racing had infinite potential. 
If playing the fool meant I could open the door to new 
possibilities for her, and give her the smallest chance——
choice_data_list: Then I'll be the biggest fool I can ever be!

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text:
………! 
……I appreciate the sentiment. I really do. But——
choice_data_list: <size=36>THE BIGGEST JOKESTER IN THE UNIVERSE!</size>

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text: You're thinkin' way too friggin' big!

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text: (Good grief, what a day… Even I can't handle getting joked at that much.)

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text:
(But… All those jokes were for the sake of my racing… 
Weren't they? And that notebook had so much material in it… 
I guess Trainer's taking this seriously, ironically enough.)

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text: ……Really… Ain't ya pushing yourself a bit too hard?
